title: RarityGlow
description: Adds dynamic glowing outlines to items based on their rarity.
body:
# ✨ RarityGlow
English RarityGlow adds a **colored glow** to dropped items based on their rarity, with an optional **particle beam** effect(1.1.1 version). | Rarity | Color | |-----------|------------| | Common | White | | Uncommon | Yellow | | Rare | Cyan | | Epic | Magenta | All colors and effects are fully customizable via **ModMenu** (config screen).
**Requires:** Fabric API, Cloth Config.
中文 RarityGlow 为掉落物添加**稀有度彩色发光**，可选**粒子光束**特效(1.1.1版本)。 | 稀有度 | 颜色 | |-----|----| | 普通 | 白色 | | 罕见 | 黄色 | | 稀有 | 青色 | | 史诗 | 品红 | 所有颜色和效果均可在 **ModMenu** 配置界面中自由调整。
**依赖：** Fabric API、Cloth Config。
